codeReview.summary: The fix removes the Input component's hardcoded wrapper and field height classes, allowing consumer-supplied height utilities such as the compact `h-7` usage in PropertiesPanel to take effect. The added regression test covers both the wrapper and inner input class override path, and I did not find behavior regressions in scope for this feature.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the feature handoff/transcript, commit 117355c3b77b37e503ec7c9cd16198a2d813cd3a, and the affected Input component/test files. The implementation matches the feature contract: `h-10` and `h-full` were removed, compact consumer classes can now control height, and regression coverage was added.
